coins.name: Coins
coins.examine: A thousand tiny cymbals in a pouch. The Offnote always keeps a cut.

bronze_axe.name: Bronze axe
bronze_axe.examine: A woodcutter's axe. The trees fear it, slowly.

bronze_pickaxe.name: Bronze pickaxe
bronze_pickaxe.examine: For persuading rocks to part with their ore.

tinderbox.name: Tinderbox
tinderbox.examine: A small box of sparks waiting to happen.

small_net.name: Small fishing net
small_net.examine: More holes than net, yet somehow it works.

hammer.name: Hammer
hammer.examine: For hitting hot metal until it apologises.

needle.name: Needle
needle.examine: Easy to lose, painful to find.

shears.name: Shears
shears.examine: Sheep see these and start jogging.

seed_dibber.name: Seed dibber
seed_dibber.examine: Pokes a seed-sized hole in the soil.

fishing_rod.name: Fishing rod
fishing_rod.examine: A rod, a line, and a great deal of patience.

bucket.name: Bucket
bucket.examine: An empty bucket, full of potential.

vial_of_water.name: Vial of water
vial_of_water.examine: Perfectly ordinary water. The Stillwater Circle insists there is no such thing.

bird_snare.name: Bird snare
bird_snare.examine: A looped trap for small, overconfident birds.

fishing_bait.name: Fishing bait
fishing_bait.examine: Wriggly. The fish disagree about whether that's appetising.

lobster_pot.name: Lobster pot
lobster_pot.examine: A wicker cage. Lobsters check in; they don't check out.

harpoon.name: Harpoon
harpoon.examine: A barbed harpoon for the fish that fight back.

chisel.name: Chisel
chisel.examine: For coaxing the sparkle out of rough gems.

bronze_sword.name: Bronze sword
bronze_sword.examine: A basic, dependable blade. Goblins can't forge these — that's why they take yours.

iron_sword.name: Iron sword
iron_sword.examine: A solid iron blade with a sensible edge.

steel_sword.name: Steel sword
steel_sword.examine: Bright steel; the smith was clearly showing off.

bronze_scimitar.name: Bronze scimitar
bronze_scimitar.examine: A curved blade that favours the swift.

iron_scimitar.name: Iron scimitar
iron_scimitar.examine: A curved iron blade with a wicked whisper.

steel_scimitar.name: Steel scimitar
steel_scimitar.examine: Curved steel, polished to a smug shine.

mithril_sword.name: Mithril sword
mithril_sword.examine: Featherlight blue steel. The arm barely notices it.

mithril_scimitar.name: Mithril scimitar
mithril_scimitar.examine: A curved sweep of sky-blue metal.

adamant_sword.name: Adamant sword
adamant_sword.examine: Deep green metal with a grudge against shields.

drake_sword.name: Drake sword
drake_sword.examine: Ground from a wing-spur of the Shadow Drake. Its fire was never in its belly — and a little of the heart came off on the blade.

rune_sword.name: Rune sword
rune_sword.examine: A blade of storm-grey rune metal. It hums when drawn.

rune_scimitar.name: Rune scimitar
rune_scimitar.examine: The curve every swordhand dreams about.

rimeglass_blade.name: Rimeglass blade
rimeglass_blade.examine: Maraza's Solo, frozen sharp. Three hundred and forty-one years of fury, given an edge.

spec.name: Held Note
spec.desc: Sing the syllable that stopped a mountain: a 25% harder hit that holds the target in ice for 4 ticks.

oak_shortbow.name: Oak shortbow
oak_shortbow.examine: An oak bow with a satisfying thrum.

iron_arrow.name: Iron arrow
iron_arrow.examine: Iron-tipped and ready to argue at range.

mithril_arrow.name: Mithril arrow
mithril_arrow.examine: Blue-tipped arrows that fly like rumours.

rune_arrow.name: Rune arrow
rune_arrow.examine: Storm-grey tips that arrive before the apology.

maple_shortbow_u.name: Maple shortbow (u)
maple_shortbow_u.examine: A shaped maple stave awaiting a string.

maple_shortbow.name: Maple shortbow
maple_shortbow.examine: A springy maple bow with an autumn temper.

yew_shortbow_u.name: Yew shortbow (u)
yew_shortbow_u.examine: A shaped yew stave. Patience made portable.

yew_shortbow.name: Yew shortbow
yew_shortbow.examine: A yew bow that takes archery very seriously.

magic_shortbow_u.name: Magic shortbow (u)
magic_shortbow_u.examine: A stave of glimmer-grained magic wood. It twitches.

magic_shortbow.name: Magic shortbow
magic_shortbow.examine: A bow cut from magic wood. The arrows are mostly a formality.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden shield
wooden_shield.examine: Splintery, but better than catching blows by hand.

bronze_full_helm.name: Bronze full helm
bronze_full_helm.examine: Keeps the rain and most of the swords off.

iron_full_helm.name: Iron full helm
iron_full_helm.examine: A full iron helm. Slightly echoey inside.

steel_full_helm.name: Steel full helm
steel_full_helm.examine: Heavy, shiny, and excellent at deflecting compliments.

bronze_platebody.name: Bronze platebody
bronze_platebody.examine: Beaten bronze for the torso. The dents come pre-ordered.

iron_platebody.name: Iron platebody
iron_platebody.examine: Solid iron plate. Rings a low, true note when struck, as Aulden intended.

steel_platebody.name: Steel platebody
steel_platebody.examine: Steel plate. You clank with authority.

bronze_platelegs.name: Bronze platelegs
bronze_platelegs.examine: Bronze plate for the lower half. Clanks in waltz time.

iron_platelegs.name: Iron platelegs
iron_platelegs.examine: Iron legwear. Walks loudly, carries big defence.

steel_platelegs.name: Steel platelegs
steel_platelegs.examine: Steel platelegs. Stairs are now a workout.

bronze_kiteshield.name: Bronze kiteshield
bronze_kiteshield.examine: A kite-shaped shield of beaten bronze.

iron_kiteshield.name: Iron kiteshield
iron_kiteshield.examine: An iron kiteshield. Does not actually fly.

steel_kiteshield.name: Steel kiteshield
steel_kiteshield.examine: A broad steel shield with a mirror polish.

mithril_full_helm.name: Mithril full helm
mithril_full_helm.examine: Light as a hat, tough as a tax collector.

mithril_platebody.name: Mithril platebody
mithril_platebody.examine: Blue plate that lets you breathe and survive at once.

mithril_platelegs.name: Mithril platelegs
mithril_platelegs.examine: Mithril legwear. Surprisingly easy on the knees.

mithril_kiteshield.name: Mithril kiteshield
mithril_kiteshield.examine: A pale-blue kiteshield. Arrows slide off, sulking.

adamant_full_helm.name: Adamant full helm
adamant_full_helm.examine: A green helm with a view like an arrow slit.

adamant_platebody.name: Adamant platebody
adamant_platebody.examine: Adamant plate. Doorways now require planning.

adamant_platelegs.name: Adamant platelegs
adamant_platelegs.examine: Green plate for the legs. Heavy, but so is regret.

adamant_kiteshield.name: Adamant kiteshield
adamant_kiteshield.examine: A broad green shield you could serve dinner on.

rune_full_helm.name: Rune full helm
rune_full_helm.examine: Storm-grey steel. Thoughts echo grandly inside.

rune_platebody.name: Rune platebody
rune_platebody.examine: Rune plate. Arrows file formal complaints.

rune_platelegs.name: Rune platelegs
rune_platelegs.examine: Rune legwear. Each step sounds expensive.

rune_kiteshield.name: Rune kiteshield
rune_kiteshield.examine: A storm-grey wall with a handle.

warlord_helm.name: Warlord helm
warlord_helm.examine: A horned goblin warhelm. Smells of victory and cabbage.

molten_gauntlets.name: Molten gauntlets
molten_gauntlets.examine: Gauntlets quenched in Korr's own forge-blood. Always warm.

red_sash.name: Red sash
red_sash.examine: Saif's silk sash. The smile is implied.

leather_body.name: Leather body
leather_body.examine: Supple leather armour. Smells faintly of cow.

leather_boots.name: Leather boots
leather_boots.examine: Comfortable boots for the long road.

gold_ring.name: Gold ring
gold_ring.examine: A plain gold band. Sentimental value sold separately.

sapphire_ring.name: Sapphire ring
sapphire_ring.examine: A gold ring set with a sea-blue sapphire.

ruby_ring.name: Ruby ring
ruby_ring.examine: A gold ring with a ruby like a drop of dawn.

gold_amulet.name: Gold amulet
gold_amulet.examine: A gold amulet on a sturdy chain. Hums faintly if you listen — but then, everything does.

sapphire_amulet.name: Sapphire amulet
sapphire_amulet.examine: The sapphire catches the light; the light keeps it.

ruby_amulet.name: Ruby amulet
ruby_amulet.examine: A ruby amulet that pulses faintly with borrowed courage.

uncut_sapphire.name: Uncut sapphire
uncut_sapphire.examine: A rough blue stone with a fortune hiding inside.

uncut_emerald.name: Uncut emerald
uncut_emerald.examine: A lumpy green stone, sparkle pending.

uncut_ruby.name: Uncut ruby
uncut_ruby.examine: A rough red stone that glows like banked coals.

sapphire.name: Sapphire
sapphire.examine: A cut sapphire, blue as deep water.

emerald.name: Emerald
emerald.examine: A cut emerald, green as fresh envy.

ruby.name: Ruby
ruby.examine: A cut ruby. It does most of the talking.

logs.name: Logs
logs.examine: Honest vale timber. The trees here are more forgiving than the Tanglewood's.

oak_logs.name: Oak logs
oak_logs.examine: Dense oak logs. Carpenter Lenny calls this grade "the good stuff".

willow_logs.name: Willow logs
willow_logs.examine: Riverbank willow. The other willows are already gossiping about it downstream.

maple_logs.name: Maple logs
maple_logs.examine: Logs cut from a maple. Faintly sweet-smelling.

yew_logs.name: Yew logs
yew_logs.examine: Logs from an ancient yew. Centuries, by the cord.

magic_logs.name: Magic logs
magic_logs.examine: Logs that shimmer when nobody is looking directly at them.

copper_ore.name: Copper ore
copper_ore.examine: A lump of copper ore, awaiting the furnace.

tin_ore.name: Tin ore
tin_ore.examine: A lump of tin ore. Half of a bronze bar, really.

iron_ore.name: Iron ore
iron_ore.examine: A heavy lump of iron ore.

coal.name: Coal
coal.examine: A chunk of coal. The furnace's favourite snack.

mithril_ore.name: Mithril ore
mithril_ore.examine: A blue-sheened lump of ore. Lighter than it looks.

adamantite_ore.name: Adamantite ore
adamantite_ore.examine: A dense green ore that dents pickaxes for fun.

gold_ore.name: Gold ore
gold_ore.examine: A lump of ore with an unmistakable gleam.

runite_ore.name: Runite ore
runite_ore.examine: Storm-grey ore. Pickaxes speak of it in whispers.

rune_essence.name: Rune essence
rune_essence.examine: A blank, unsung stone, waiting to be taught one syllable of the First Chord.

bronze_bar.name: Bronze bar
bronze_bar.examine: A bar of bronze, ready for the anvil.

iron_bar.name: Iron bar
iron_bar.examine: A bar of iron, hard-won from stubborn ore.

steel_bar.name: Steel bar
steel_bar.examine: A bar of fine steel. Coal makes all the difference.

mithril_bar.name: Mithril bar
mithril_bar.examine: A bar of sky-blue metal, humming faintly with promise.

adamantite_bar.name: Adamantite bar
adamantite_bar.examine: A bar of adamantite. The anvil braces itself.

gold_bar.name: Gold bar
gold_bar.examine: A bar of solid gold. Heavier than it looks, lighter than it leaves.

rune_bar.name: Rune bar
rune_bar.examine: A bar of rune metal. The pinnacle of the furnace's art.

air_rune.name: Air rune
air_rune.examine: A frozen syllable of Quiess. Mostly breath; handle gently.

mind_rune.name: Mind rune
mind_rune.examine: A rune stone holding a single sharp thought.

water_rune.name: Water rune
water_rune.examine: A frozen syllable of Brell. A whole tide, pebble-sized.

earth_rune.name: Earth rune
earth_rune.examine: A frozen syllable of Aulden. The patience of mountains, pocket-sized.

fire_rune.name: Fire rune
fire_rune.examine: A frozen syllable of Imber. Warm to the touch, ambitious to the core.

chaos_rune.name: Chaos rune
chaos_rune.examine: A rune stone that can't quite make up its mind. Violently.

arrow_shaft.name: Arrow shaft
arrow_shaft.examine: A straight wooden shaft, two-thirds of an arrow.

headless_arrow.name: Headless arrow
headless_arrow.examine: Flighted shafts in need of a point.

rune_arrowtips.name: Rune arrowtips
rune_arrowtips.examine: Small pointed caps of rune metal. Handle respectfully.

mithril_arrowtips.name: Mithril arrowtips
mithril_arrowtips.examine: Small pointed caps of pale-blue mithril.

adamant_arrowtips.name: Adamant arrowtips
adamant_arrowtips.examine: Small pointed caps of green adamantite.

shortbow_u.name: Shortbow (u)
shortbow_u.examine: A shaped bow stave. Needs a string.

flax.name: Flax
flax.examine: A bundle of flax stems with pretty blue flowers.

bowstring.name: Bowstring
bowstring.examine: Spun flax, strong enough to fling arrows.

ball_of_wool.name: Ball of wool
ball_of_wool.examine: Wool, but rounder and more useful.

cowhide.name: Cowhide
cowhide.examine: The tanner could make something of this.

plank.name: Plank
plank.examine: A sawn plank. Flat-pack furniture awaits.

nails.name: Nails
nails.examine: A handful of nails. Mind your thumbs.

eye_of_newt.name: Eye of newt
eye_of_newt.examine: The newt insists it has a spare.

bones.name: Bones
bones.examine: Bury them and hum. Quiess only listens to music.

drake_scale.name: Drake scale
drake_scale.examine: A scale the size of a dinner plate, still faintly smoking.

horror_hide.name: Horror hide
horror_hide.examine: A slab of mossy, rubbery hide. It squelches when poked.

warlord_banner.name: Warlord's banner
warlord_banner.examine: A warband's sheet music, in flag form. The spelling is optimistic; the rhythm is load-bearing.

bog_heart.name: Bog heart
bog_heart.examine: A fist-sized knot of peat and root. It beats, slowly.

ember_crystal.name: Ember crystal
ember_crystal.examine: A crystal with a live coal trapped inside, forever burning.

molten_core.name: Molten core
molten_core.examine: The still-beating heart of Korr's forge. Do not pocket near parchment.

bear_fur.name: Bear fur
bear_fur.examine: A thick, warm pelt. The bear drove a hard bargain.

spider_silk.name: Spider silk
spider_silk.examine: A skein of pale silk, stronger than it has any right to be.

grave_dust.name: Grave dust
grave_dust.examine: A pinch of grey dust that settles slower than it should. Herbalists pay for the strangest things.

boarding_cutlass.name: Boarding cutlass
boarding_cutlass.examine: A broad, salt-pitted blade made for short arguments on narrow decks.

wreck_chart.name: Wreck chart
wreck_chart.examine: A salt-stained chart of the cove's shoals, with one wreck circled twice.

elder_charm.name: Elder charm
elder_charm.examine: A carved wooden charm on a cord, warm with an old village blessing.

grimy_guam.name: Grimy guam leaf
grimy_guam.examine: A herb in dire need of a wash.

grimy_marrentill.name: Grimy marrentill
grimy_marrentill.examine: A muddy herb of modest promise.

defence_potion.name: Defence potion
defence_potion.examine: Thickens the skin and the resolve.

grimy_ranarr.name: Grimy ranarr weed
grimy_ranarr.examine: A muddy herb that healers would tut over.

ranarr_weed.name: Ranarr weed
ranarr_weed.examine: A clean ranarr weed, prized by the prayerful.

grimy_irit.name: Grimy irit leaf
grimy_irit.examine: A grubby leaf with a sharp, promising smell.

irit_leaf.name: Irit leaf
irit_leaf.examine: A clean irit leaf. Bitter, but in a useful way.

prayer_potion.name: Prayer potion
prayer_potion.examine: Tastes like cold chapel air. The soul perks up.

super_attack.name: Super attack potion
super_attack.examine: The regular attack potion's ambitious cousin.

raw_shrimps.name: Raw shrimps
raw_shrimps.examine: A netful of shrimps, recently outwitted.

shrimps.name: Shrimps
shrimps.examine: Shrimps, cooked to a polite pink. Every adventurer's first triumph.

raw_anchovies.name: Raw anchovies
raw_anchovies.examine: Small fish, big opinions. The fire will settle the argument.

anchovies.name: Anchovies
anchovies.examine: Cooked anchovies. Salty enough to season a grudge.

raw_sardine.name: Raw sardine
raw_sardine.examine: A slippery little fish, best cooked.

raw_herring.name: Raw herring
raw_herring.examine: A silvery fish in need of a fire.

raw_lobster.name: Raw lobster
raw_lobster.examine: A lobster, still glaring. Cooking is advised.

lobster.name: Lobster
lobster.examine: A cooked lobster. Fancy eating for a fancy adventurer.

raw_swordfish.name: Raw swordfish
raw_swordfish.examine: A fish armed better than some guards.

swordfish.name: Swordfish
swordfish.examine: A cooked swordfish. The sword is decorative now.

shark.name: Shark
shark.examine: A cooked shark. Revenge, served hot.

burnt_fish.name: Burnt fish
burnt_fish.examine: A note held too long. Edda warned you.

raw_beef.name: Raw beef
raw_beef.examine: The cow held up its end of the bargain. The range is yours.

cooked_meat.name: Cooked meat
cooked_meat.examine: Honest cooked meat. Grass, converted twice.

raw_chicken.name: Raw chicken
raw_chicken.examine: It was definitely a chicken. Cooking is the respectful next step.

cooked_chicken.name: Cooked chicken
cooked_chicken.examine: Roast chicken, crisp at the edges. The farm predates the castle; dinner predates both.

raw_bird_meat.name: Raw bird meat
raw_bird_meat.examine: A small bird, plucked and ready for the spit.

roast_bird_meat.name: Roast bird meat
roast_bird_meat.examine: Crispy roast bird on a stick.

bread.name: Bread
bread.examine: A crusty loaf, still warm. Smells like Pim's ambitions.

potato_seed.name: Potato seed
potato_seed.examine: A seed potato with grand ambitions.

cabbage_seed.name: Cabbage seed
cabbage_seed.examine: It dreams of being a cabbage one day.

sweetcorn_seed.name: Sweetcorn seed
sweetcorn_seed.examine: A kernel with big golden plans.

egg.name: Egg
egg.examine: A fresh egg. Handle with care.

bucket_of_milk.name: Bucket of milk
bucket_of_milk.examine: Fresh milk, courtesy of a patient cow.

cake.name: Cake
cake.examine: Banquet-grade cake. The Duke had three slices; his physician must never know.

glock_18.name: Glock 18
glock_18.examine: The starter pistol every adventurer gets. Reliable, loud, and slightly alarming.

iron_pistol.name: Iron pistol
iron_pistol.examine: A sturdy iron sidearm with a satisfying heft.

steel_pistol.name: Steel pistol
steel_pistol.examine: Tempered steel slide, crisp trigger, professional disagreement.

mithril_pistol.name: Mithril pistol
mithril_pistol.examine: Light as a whisper, hits like a sermon.

adamant_pistol.name: Adamant pistol
adamant_pistol.examine: Green-tinged adamant frame built for serious range work.

rune_pistol.name: Rune pistol
rune_pistol.examine: Storm-grey rune steel. The argument ends before they finish talking.

bronze_round.name: Bronze round
bronze_round.examine: A bronze-cased pistol round. Cheap, cheerful, effective.

steel_round.name: Steel round
steel_round.examine: Hardened steel rounds that punch through excuses.

mithril_round.name: Mithril round
mithril_round.examine: Blue-tipped mithril rounds — fast and unforgiving.

adamant_round.name: Adamant round
adamant_round.examine: Green-tipped adamant rounds for hardened targets.

rune_round.name: Rune round
rune_round.examine: Storm-grey rune rounds. Overkill is a kind of politeness.

gunpowder.name: Gunpowder
gunpowder.examine: Milled thunder-shale — the Offnote's own percussion, ground fine. The Guild calls firing it "recycling".

bronze_bullet_casing.name: Bronze bullet casing
bronze_bullet_casing.examine: Empty bronze casings waiting for powder and a primer.

iron_bullet_casing.name: Iron bullet casing
iron_bullet_casing.examine: Iron casings stamped at the guild foundry.

steel_bullet_casing.name: Steel bullet casing
steel_bullet_casing.examine: Hardened steel casings for serious loads.

adamant_bullet_casing.name: Adamant bullet casing
adamant_bullet_casing.examine: Adamant casings that barely flex under pressure.

rune_bullet_casing.name: Rune bullet casing
rune_bullet_casing.examine: Rune casings for the guild's finest ammunition.

sparkling_cocktail.name: Sparkling cocktail
sparkling_cocktail.examine: Bubbles, citrus, and the faint taste of poor choices.

rainbow_scarf.name: Rainbow scarf
rainbow_scarf.examine: Soft wool in every stripe. Wear it loud.

foam_sword.name: Foam sword
foam_sword.examine: Accord-issue foam. Every harmless thwack starves the Offnote a little.

larp_pride_cape.name: LARP pride cape
larp_pride_cape.examine: Black velvet lined with rainbow satin. Dramatic entrance guaranteed.

chimperton_medallion.name: Chimperton medallion
chimperton_medallion.examine: Commemorates Danquavious Chimperton III. Smells faintly of banana.

tick_jerky.name: Tick jerky
tick_jerky.examine: Dried ticks from the Dentist Tick Eat clinic. Chewy.

fluoride_ration.name: Fluoride ration
fluoride_ration.examine: Minty paste in a tube. Not technically food, but Glen approves.

resonant_shard.name: Resonant shard
resonant_shard.examine: A sliver of ore that rings a note the rock never sang. Brigh pays for these.

tuning_hammer.name: Tuning hammer
tuning_hammer.examine: Foreman-pattern maul, re-trued against the First Chord. Whatever it strikes ends up back in key.

spec.name: True Strike
spec.desc: A re-truing blow: +50% damage with improved accuracy.

tuned_pickaxe.name: Tuned pickaxe
tuned_pickaxe.examine: The head hums a true fifth above the seam. It finds the ore a tenth sooner.

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.examine: A sheaf of grain. Full of potential, most of it bread.

flour.name: Flour
flour.examine: Soft white flour, ground the right way round. Hob checked twice.

shim_receipt.name: Shim receipt
shim_receipt.examine: Receipt for one (1) lucky millstone shim, sold in good faith. The ink is somehow still wet.

lucky_shim.name: Lucky shim
lucky_shim.examine: A sliver of grey stone, carved into a wedge. It hums a half-beat behind itself.

court_verdict.name: Court verdict
court_verdict.examine: Sealed by the Court of the Southern Lawn. Legally unimpeachable. Faintly banana-scented.

millers_token.name: Miller's token
millers_token.examine: A wooden token good for flour at Greaves Mill. 'ONE per visit,' it says, underlined twice.

tuning_fork.name: Tuning fork
tuning_fork.examine: It hums a half-beat before you strike it. That isn't how forks work.

clinic_note.name: Clinic note
clinic_note.examine: Dr. Ticksworth's mote figures, signed and dated. There is a small graph.

mira_letter.name: Mira's letter
mira_letter.examine: Addressed to Master Flint, Aldgate Gun Guild. The handwriting stands slightly to the right.

wizards_writ.name: Wizards' writ
wizards_writ.examine: One parchment, two furious signatures, three postscripts. The conclusion is unanimous; the postscripts are not.

guild_powder_horn.name: Guild powder horn
guild_powder_horn.examine: Guild-stamped brass, polished by worry. Flint says it has never once fizzled, which is why he won't let it hear the ledger.

mine_survey.name: Old mine survey
mine_survey.examine: The north gallery is circled in Foreman Hollis's hand: 'Not a cave-in. Don't let them dig.'

blasting_charge.name: Blasting charge
blasting_charge.examine: Guild-milled thunder-shale, packed and fused. Vex counted every grain twice.

foreman_ledger.name: Foreman's ledger
foreman_ledger.examine: Wat Hollis's last ledger. The final entry isn't about ore.

joint_writ.name: Joint writ
joint_writ.examine: One plan, two signatures, forty-one clauses. The plan is clause thirty-eight.

torn_score_page.name: Torn score page
torn_score_page.examine: One bar of the Second Chord, in a steady hand. Somewhere, the rest of it is being written.

dissonant_baton.name: Dissonant baton
dissonant_baton.examine: A conductor's baton of slate and stretched wire. Held aloft, you can feel it counting you in.

spec.name: Caesura
spec.desc: Conduct a hard rest: the target can neither move nor attack for 3 ticks.

ravenmoor_diary.name: Ravenmoor diary
ravenmoor_diary.examine: Final entry, F.S. 738: "a note that never resolves; it helps me sleep."

white_lily.name: White lily
white_lily.examine: It grows where water sits quiet. A flower with manners.

cellar_key.name: Cellar key
cellar_key.examine: Oiled and kept ready for five years by a man who never once turned it.

ravenmoor_signet.name: Ravenmoor signet
ravenmoor_signet.examine: The seal of a house that keeps the truth now. The manor knows it on sight.

hollow_verse.name: Hollow verse
hollow_verse.examine: The closing line of a Discord Wars hymn, in handwriting that doesn't rustle.

quiess_feather.name: Quiess feather
quiess_feather.examine: Weighs less than the silence between notes.

lamp_oil.name: Lamp oil
lamp_oil.examine: Pressed whale-oil in a stoppered flask. Burns steady, smells of arguments at sea.

keepers_spyglass.name: Keeper's spyglass
keepers_spyglass.examine: Brand Wicklow's spare glass. Everything you sight through it looks slightly disappointed in you.

powder_grit.name: Powder grit
powder_grit.examine: Black milled grit with a stamp in the grain. Found in a crate of fish that never swam.

guild_writ.name: Guild writ
guild_writ.examine: Sergeant Vex's deputising writ. The handwriting is very, very calm.

false_manifest.name: False manifest
false_manifest.examine: Shipping papers in two hands. The fish are fictional; the fence is not.

powder_keg.name: Powder keg
powder_keg.examine: Milled thunder-shale, labelled 'FRESH SHARK (DO NOT OPEN)'. For once the label is good advice.

guild_deputy_badge.name: Guild deputy badge
guild_deputy_badge.examine: An Aldgate Gun Guild deputy's badge. It expects you to count your rounds.

red_smile.name: The Red Smile
red_smile.examine: Saif's own scimitar. Every cut a ballot, and he counted those himself too.

spec.name: Landslide Victory
spec.desc: Carve the widest smile yet: +25% damage and a guaranteed deep bleed.

dune_kings_grips.name: Dune king's grips
dune_kings_grips.examine: Saif teaches greed, not discipline. These gloves take a cut of everything they touch.

sarrash_temple_silk.name: Sarrash temple silk
sarrash_temple_silk.examine: Red silk from singing Sarrash. Saif wears the same — he may be right about the city.

templesilk_wraps.name: Templesilk wraps
templesilk_wraps.examine: Three skeins of temple red, wound the way the caravans remember. The desert owes somebody a city.

mirefang.name: Mirefang
mirefang.examine: A curved fang of black bog-oak and tooth, still weeping. Three villages drowned on the Night of Skipped Beats; this is what their refrain bites with.

spec.name: Third Toll
spec.desc: Drive the fang deep: a guaranteed venom that tolls once for each drowned village.

stillwater_amulet.name: Stillwater amulet
stillwater_amulet.examine: A drowned pearl set in old gold, strung by the Stillwater Circle. Hold it to your ear and the bog holds you back.

drowned_pearl.name: Drowned pearl
drowned_pearl.examine: A grey pearl from the Deep Bog peat. It remembers being a bell, and on still nights it sweats.

bog_horror_fang.name: Bog horror fang
bog_horror_fang.examine: A tooth of root-wrapped bone. The Offnote grew it out of grudge, not hunger.

errata_pistol.name: Errata
errata_pistol.examine: A pistol transcribed from the copyist's slate and stretched wire. Every shot is a note the First Chord never wrote.

spec.name: Second Chord
spec.desc: Fire two notes at once — a chord the Choir never sanctioned. Two boosted hits.

dissonant_sliver.name: Dissonant sliver
dissonant_sliver.examine: A shard of the copyist's slate. It remembers one note of what it was — and it is wrong about it.

wrongnote_round.name: Wrongnote round
wrongnote_round.examine: A slate-tipped pistol round milled from the copyist's wreck. It leaves the barrel out of key and arrives out of patience.

drakebreath_staff.name: Drakebreath staff
drakebreath_staff.examine: A drake rib crowned with a live ember crystal. When it exhales, the room goes the colour of a bad night.

nightscale_coif.name: Nightscale coif
nightscale_coif.examine: Moulted drake scales sewn into a hood. They still shed darkness the way hot iron sheds sparks.

nightscale.name: Nightscale
nightscale.examine: A moulted scale blacker than the cave it fell in. Light goes into it and files no report.

drakescale_vambraces.name: Drakescale vambraces
drakescale_vambraces.examine: Nightscale plates over supple leather. In dim light your hands simply stop being there.

marazas_signet.name: Maraza's signet
marazas_signet.examine: The seal of Frostpeak's last queen, still cold enough to bite. Her court has been bowing to it, mid-syllable, since F.S. 402.

rimeglass_shard.name: Rimeglass shard
rimeglass_shard.examine: A splinter of the unfinished note. It hums one cold syllable, over and over, and never the next.

rimeglass_ring.name: Rimeglass ring
rimeglass_ring.examine: A band of singing ice that never melts. Wearing it feels like remembering snow.

cindermaul.name: Cindermaul
cindermaul.examine: Stone that walks, fire that thinks — and this is what it thinks with.

spec.name: Forgefall
spec.desc: Bring the whole forge down at once: +50% damage, and an accurate hit always sets the target burning.

unstruck_bell.name: Unstruck bell
unstruck_bell.examine: Brogan's worst theory, hammered flat for a grip. The deep's loudest word, and it has never once been rung.

spec.name: Toll
spec.desc: Ring it, just once. Everything nearby hears the note it was never meant to carry and falters.

everburn_slag.name: Everburn slag
everburn_slag.examine: Spillage from Korr's anvil that never learned to cool. Smiths pay well for fuel that refuses to quit.

slagplate.name: Slagplate
slagplate.examine: Armour smithed from the workshop you inherited. Warm side in, please.

shardsong_bow.name: Shardsong bow
shardsong_bow.examine: Strung across a rib of the Heart. Every arrow leaves it singing a note Aulden never released.

spec.name: Sympathetic Ring
spec.desc: The arrow keeps ringing in the wound: a boosted shot that always leaves a resonance bleed.

echo_pick.name: Echo pick
echo_pick.examine: Wat Hollis's pick, still swinging the shift it never clocked out of. It knocks twice on whatever it hits.

spec.name: Knock Twice
spec.desc: Once for Aulden, once for whoever didn't come back: two full strikes in one swing.

shardpoint_arrowtips.name: Shardpoint arrowtips
shardpoint_arrowtips.examine: Slivers of the Heart knapped to a point. They hum until they're loosed.

shardpoint_arrow.name: Shardpoint arrow
shardpoint_arrow.examine: Crystal-tipped arrows that arrive a breath ahead of their own note.

banner_cleaver.name: Banner cleaver
banner_cleaver.examine: A cleaver hafted on the Broken-Tooth banner-pole. The whole march is scored down the blade, and it ends badly.

spec.name: Broken Chorus
spec.desc: Bellow the Broken-Tooth march back at them, off-key: nearby foes attack at 70% for 16 ticks.

chantbreaker_ward.name: Chantbreaker ward
chantbreaker_ward.examine: A buckler faced with a stolen bar of the Broken-Tooth march. Goblins hate hearing it played back wrong.

brokentooth_chant_page.name: Broken-Tooth chant page
brokentooth_chant_page.examine: A torn measure of the warband's banner. Somewhere, a goblin has forgotten the words.

war_march_score.name: War-march score
war_march_score.examine: Six stolen measures of the Broken-Tooth march, rebound. Hum it and your shoulders square on their own.

wolf_fang_amulet.name: Wolf fang amulet
wolf_fang_amulet.examine: A dire fang on a sinew cord. Beasts remember the bite.

stinger_dirk.name: Stinger dirk
stinger_dirk.examine: A dagger ground from a scorpion's tail barb. Still arguing.

spidersilk_bowstring.name: Spidersilk bowstring
spidersilk_bowstring.examine: A bowstring spun from forest-spider silk. Waiting for a bow worthy of it.

wraithcloth_robes.name: Wraithcloth robes
wraithcloth_robes.examine: Robes woven from cloth that forgot it was buried. Cold against the skin, warm against a spell.

trollbone_club.name: Trollbone club
trollbone_club.examine: A femur the size of a fencepost. Subtlety sold separately.

corsairs_fang.name: Corsair's fang
corsairs_fang.examine: Saltjaw's own blade. He beat time on the rail with it, double-quick, and the crew rowed or bled.

direwolf_pelt_cloak.name: Direwolf pelt cloak
direwolf_pelt_cloak.examine: A heavy grey pelt worn over the shoulders. The forest steps aside.

bearclaw_necklace.name: Bearclaw necklace
bearclaw_necklace.examine: Five claws on a leather thong. The bargain was renegotiated.

grave_ring.name: Grave ring
grave_ring.examine: A tarnished signet pulled from old earth. It hums a name you don't know.

ember_charm.name: Ember charm
ember_charm.examine: A cinder imp's heart-coal in a brass cage. It never quite goes out.

mote_dust.name: Mote dust
mote_dust.examine: Glittering grit left when a discord mote falls silent. Tuners and enchanters pay well for a quiet pinch.

bandit_black_wrap.name: Bandit's black wrap
bandit_black_wrap.examine: A dust-stained head wrap. Anonymous, breathable, mildly incriminating.

goblin_lucky_tooth.name: Goblin lucky tooth
goblin_lucky_tooth.examine: A goblin's lucky tooth. Not lucky enough, evidently.

gilded_egg.name: Gilded egg
gilded_egg.examine: An egg with a shell of true gold leaf. The hen has questions to answer.

ivory_cowbell.name: Ivory cowbell
ivory_cowbell.examine: A carved ivory bell on a collar. Rings a perfect, pointless C.

rat_tail_talisman.name: Rat tail talisman
rat_tail_talisman.examine: A knotted rat tail. Sewer luck is still luck.

guardsman_signet.name: Guardsman's signet
guardsman_signet.examine: A city watch ring, slightly dented. Wearing it is probably a crime.

dirge_blade.name: Dirge blade
dirge_blade.examine: A slate-dark sword tuned to a falling minor third. The Offnote hear their own ending in it.

spec.name: Final Rest
spec.desc: A single resolving chord: one swing with 30% more accuracy and 60% more damage.

cull_band.name: Cull band
cull_band.examine: An iron ring stamped with Brogan's tally-mark. Each notch was earned the hard way.

wardens_visor.name: Warden's visor
wardens_visor.examine: A slayer's half-helm with a slit visor. Sees trouble coming and charges it anyway.

tome_of_grudges.name: Tome of grudges
tome_of_grudges.examine: Brogan's field notes on things that needed killing. Read once, learn plenty.
